1: Make known his deeds among the people.
2: Talk ye of all his wondrous works.
3: Let the heart of them rejoice that seek the LORD LORD .
5: His wonders, and the judgments of his mouth;
6: Ye children of Jacob his chosen.
7: His judgments are are in all the earth.
8: The word which which he commanded to a thousand generations.
10: And And to Israel for for an everlasting covenant:
12: Yea, very few, and strangers in it.
13: From one one kingdom to another people;
14: Yea, he reproved kings for their sakes;
15: And do my prophets no harm.
16: He brake the whole staff of bread.
17: Even Even Joseph, who who was sold for a servant:
19: The word of the LORD LORD tried him.
20: Even Even the ruler of the people, and let him go free.
21: And ruler of all his substance:
23: And Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
24: And made them stronger than their enemies.
25: To deal subtilly with his servants.
26: And And Aaron whom he had chosen.
27: And wonders in the land of Ham.
28: And they rebelled not against his word.
30: In the chambers of their kings.
31: And And lice in all their coasts.
32: And And flaming fire in their land.
33: And brake the trees of their coasts.
34: He spake, and the locusts came, and caterpillers, and that without number,
35: And did eat up all the herbs in their land, and devoured the fruit of their ground.
36: The chief of all their strength.
37: And there was there was not one feeble person person among their tribes.
38: For the fear of them fell upon them.
39: And fire to give light in the night.
40: And satisfied them with the bread of heaven.
41: They ran in the dry places like like a river.
43: And And his chosen with gladness:
44: And they inherited the labour of the people;
